name: Linear
description: Linear project and issue tracking for software teams

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Linear
2. Go to Settings > Account > Security & Access (or visit https://linear.app/settings/account/security)
3. Under Personal API keys, click Create key
4. Paste the key below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Linear > Settings > Account > Security & Access > Personal API keys > Create key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Linear is connected and lists workspace members
